title: kb.entry.deleted v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/kb_ops/entry.rs:431) when a hard delete (`kb entry delete --force`) irreversibly removes an entry's markdown file (and its .attachments dir, if present). Distinct from archive/unarchive, which are reversible. Source: /kb.

title.description: Entry title from frontmatter, if present at delete time.

file.description: Path of the deleted markdown file.
